title: Chat
noAgentFound: No agents found, please add one
selectProjectToUpload: Please select a project before uploading files
systemPromptContext: 【System Instruction】You are currently in the project root directory (Absolute Path: {projectRoot}), which contains 'projects' and 'skills' folders. Skills are stored in the '{projectRoot}/skills/' directory. Before answering the user, you must proactively use 'ls' to check all subdirectories under '{projectRoot}/skills/', and read the SKILL.md or related files in each subdirectory to match the user's intent. Please find the most matching skill and execute it yourself, never ask the user to provide a specific skill folder name! When reading and writing project files, please access the '{projectRoot}/projects/' folder directly, and do not create a 'projects' folder under the 'skills/' directory! Note: Whenever a skill generates a node, it must first generate an episode-node (which needs to include core fields such as title, core plot points, emotional rhythm, main characters, etc., please refer to line 22 and related definitions in {projectRoot}/skills/episode-plan/SKILL.md).
pressEnterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line
assetImageGuidePrefix: Please mention @asset image in the prompt based on the configured model 👉🏻
selectedNodesPrompt: Only operate on node ids {id}, do not operate on other nodes
skillInProgressWarning: A skill is currently in progress. Leaving will cause related content to be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?
noProjectSelectedPrompt: Cannot expand without a selected canvas
noSkillsPrompt: Cannot expand without reading skills files
